calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Justin Brown And Catalina Structured Funding Inc Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq.
Off Calendar Apr-12-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Christopher Milton, Esq, of the Law Offices of Christopher R. Milton, T:800.449.6311, for petitioner/moving party, by Court Call;
Justin Brown, Payee/Transferor, appearing on his own behalf.

RULING: The Court questioned and examined Mr. Brown. After hearing, and to the satisfacton of the Court,

PETITIONER CATALINA STRUCTURED FUNDING, INC.'s Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Justin Brown And Catalina Structured Funding Inc. Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq. is GRANTED.

ORDER SIGNED. [See signed order for details of the settlement.]

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.
